description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded edges. The front features a large glass touchscreen display with a single circular home button at the bottom and a speaker grille, front-facing camera, and sensors at the top. The back is metallic with a matte finish, displaying a prominent Apple logo in the center and a single camera lens with flash in the top left corner. The sides are metallic, housing several physical buttons including volume controls and a mute switch on the left, and a power button on the right. The device is thin and lightweight, with a seamless transition between the glass front and metal back. The overall color scheme is a dark gray or space gray with silver accents.
description: A sleek, dark gray Apple smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, metallic back, and side buttons. Features a single rear camera and prominent Apple logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass touchscreen display, home button, and visible app icons.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile and side buttons, including volume controls and mute switch.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the metallic finish, centered Apple logo, and single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the slimness and the power button.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the dark metallic surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a typical iOS home screen with app icons, a clock widget, and a wallpaper featuring a group of people. The status bar shows the time, date, and standard indicators.
attribute_camera_placement: A single rear camera lens with an adjacent flash is located in the top left corner on the back. A front-facing camera is positioned above the screen, near the top edge.
attribute_button_layout: There is a circular home button below the screen on the front. The left edge has two volume buttons and a mute switch, while the right edge features a single power button.
